allow: PowerShell($themingDir = "D:\\Projects\\Web Apps\\LIBRARIES\\memobit-react\\src\\styles\\theming"; $toClean = @\('arctic-blue','azure-night','crimson-dusk','cyber-forest','dashdarkx','ember-night','frost-petal','lavender-mist','light-blue','luna','mint-meadow','mintone','neon-tokyo','ocean-breeze','ocean-depths','sandstone','tailwind-vue-dark','twilight-pulse'\); $pattern = '    --font-family-emphasis: var\(--font-family, sans-serif\);'; foreach \($name in $toClean\) { $path = Join-Path $themingDir "$name.scss"; $content = Get-Content $path -Raw; $newContent = $content -replace [regex]::Escape\("$pattern`r`n"\), ''; Set-Content $path -Value $newContent -NoNewline -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "$name : $\(if \($content -ne $newContent\) { 'cleaned' } else { 'unchanged' }\)" })

Bash(rg -l "\(#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,6}|'#[0-9a-fA-F]\)" bed.tsx layers.tsx dot.tsx dog.tsx goat.tsx monkey.tsx banana.tsx candy.tsx coffee.tsx knife.tsx strawberry.tsx bones.tsx hospital.tsx mental.tsx tree.tsx plug.tsx purifier.tsx speaker.tsx transport-box.tsx language.tsx girl.tsx strength.tsx trophy.tsx police-man.tsx bow.tsx ruler.tsx incognito.tsx web.tsx hd.tsx trend-down.tsx stop-sign.tsx sd.tsx scan.tsx heating.tsx)

Bash(rm -f "D:/Projects/Web Apps/Local Tools/emoji-to-favicon/craco.config.js" "D:/Projects/Web Apps/Local Tools/emoji-to-favicon/public/index.html" "D:/Projects/Web Apps/Online/central/dev/frontend/craco.config.js" "D:/Projects/Web Apps/Online/central/dev/frontend/public/index.html" && echo "deleted")
Bash(cd "D:\\Projects\\Web Apps" && grep -rln "styles/utilities" --include=*.scss --include=*.css --include=*.tsx --include=*.ts books/prod cars/prod 2>/dev/null | head -20)

Bash(cd "D:\\Projects\\Web Apps\\LIBRARIES\\memobit-react" && npx sass src/styles/utility-classes.scss:/tmp/uc-check.css --no-source-map 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo "OK compiled" && head -3 /tmp/uc-check.css)
Bash(awk '/^export const iconMap/,/^} as const;/' src/components/Icon/iconMap.ts)

Bash(cd "D:\\Projects\\Web Apps\\LIBRARIES\\memobit-react" && sed -E "s/^    '?\([a-zA-Z0-9-]+\)'?\(:.*\)?,$/\\1/" /tmp/mapbody.txt | sort > /tmp/allkeys.txt && echo "keys extracted: $\(wc -l < /tmp/allkeys.txt\)" && echo "unique: $\(sort -u /tmp/allkeys.txt | wc -l\)" && echo "=== any line that failed to reduce to a bare key ===" && grep -nE "[ :',]" /tmp/allkeys.txt && echo "\(should be empty above\)")

Bash(cd "D:/Projects/Web Apps/Online" && for p in cars central medical movies nutrition pdt recipes shopping todo travel; do echo "=== $p ==="; grep -h "<title>" "$p/dev/frontend/index.html" 2>/dev/null; echo -n "manifest: "; grep -hE '"\(short_\)?name"' "$p/dev/frontend/public/manifest.json" 2>/dev/null | tr '\\n' ' '; echo; echo -n "root-pkg-name: "; grep -h '"name"' "$p/package.json" 2>/dev/null | head -1; echo; done)

Bash(grep -rlE "appName: '\(Books Manager|Cars Manager|Central|Medical|Movies Manager|Nutrition|Personal Development|Recipes Manager|Shopping|Todo Manager|Travel\)'|siteName: '\(Book Manager|Cars Manager|Movie Manager|Medical|Development Tracker|Recipe Manager|Shopping List|Todo List|Travel\)'" --include=*.tsx shelf garage hub pulse reels nutritrack ascend cookbook basket tasks voyage)
